name: Cheese Toast WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat toaster oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except bread.
3. Place the bread on the toaster-oven tray and spread half of the cheese mixture on each slice.
4. Bake until the cheese mixture is puffed, about 5 minutes.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1 Protein, 2 Breads, 50 Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 251 calories, 11 g protein, 8 g fat, 34 g carbohydrates, 186 mg calcium, 340 mg sodium, 23 mg cholesterol. Calories from fat: 27.3%.
